title: §29 security/effects appendix
manager: The security and effects appendix — the normative document describing FSL's effect boundary, persistence surface, and their security implications, drafted here with input from the trust era's security review. This is the written contract for what a machine can and cannot do to the outside world, which the fleet era's host implementations must honor and the trust era's threat model is built on top of.
cs: §29 security/effects-model appendix, drafted with era-5/v14 security-review input; the normative effect-boundary + persistence-surface contract; feeds the fleet ABI (W11.1).
